language

  • विकृतम् प्रज्ञापारमिताहृदयसूत्रम् (2021-02-10). An exercise in learning some Sanskrit
  • Annotated bibliography on Hindi-Urdu (2020-01-28). Well, partially annotated anyway...
  • Grierson on "Hindostānī" (2020-01-15). Excerpts from the Imperial Gazetteer of India
  • Hindustani honorific verbs (2019-07-17). Honorifics à la Japanese in Urdu-Hindi
  • Hindi and Urdu (2018-12-13). A work of satire by Saadat Hasan Manto
  • हिंदी और उर्दू (2018-12-12). सआदत हसन मंटो का एक लेख
  • Schwa Deletion in Hindustani (2018-07-12). A discussion of several kinds of deleted schwas

math

  • Implicitization (2020-11-18). Scheme-theoretic version of Cox-Little-O'Shea's "implicitization" results
  • Proj, "extension," and "closure" (2020-11-18). Scheme-theoretic discussion of Cox-Little-O'Shea's "extension" and "closure" theorems
  • Relative Frobenius of a weakly étale morphism (2019-02-28). A fun lemma

miscellaneous

  • My Name (2018-06-15). Some information about my names

translation

  • ग्रोटेस्कनामा (2021-05-25). शेरवुद ऐंडरसन की एक कहानी
  • Hindi and Urdu (2018-12-13). A work of satire by Saadat Hasan Manto
  • Here comes the procession of the Sun! (2017-10-05). A poem by Harivansh Rai Bachchan
  • ऐनाबेल ली (2017-05-31). एडगर ऐलन पो की एक कविता

transliteration
